info.name: Farm AI Assistant
info.description: Farm AI Assistant API. Context, chat send, chat list/create, message history, and chat delete.

request.description: Returns static farm context for the context bar.
Returns only chat id and message count for the current user.
Creates a new empty chat for the current user.
Returns all user and assistant messages for one chat.

response.name: Success

request.description: Sends a user message and returns a structured assistant reply.

response.name: Success

request.description: Deletes one chat and all messages inside it.
